name: Crock Pot Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat and onion until the meat is cooked through.
2. Remove excess grease from the pot.
3. Add sauces to taste.
4. Simmer for a few minutes.
5. Cook noodles until they are al dente (cooked but still firm).
6. Do not allow noodles to become soft.
7. In the crockpot, layer sauce, cooked noodles, meat and sauce mixture, cheeses, pepperoni, and as much mushrooms and green peppers as desired.
8. Repeat layers one more time or several times more if preferred.
9. Cook on high for 30 minutes, then switch to low heat and cook for an additional hour (or two hours) until the cheese has melted.
10. Alternatively, this dish can be prepared in a deep casserole dish in the oven at 350°F until the cheese melts.
